mapper.sql: SELECT peer_bank_id, org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time FROM jw_peer_bank_info
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') ORDER BY peer_bank_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_peer_bank_info ( org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{orgAddress}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{bankName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{town}, #{gridCode}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_peer_bank_info ( org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{orgAddress}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{bankName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{town}, #{gridCode}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE org_name = VALUES(org_name), org_address = VALUES(org_address), longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), bank_name = VALUES(bank_name), province = VALUES(province), city = VALUES(city), district = VALUES(district), town = VALUES(town), grid_code = VALUES(grid_code), update_time = sysdate()
